frontend-frameworks.name: Marko
frontend-frameworks.description: eBay's HTML-based framework with a resumable compiler, streaming, and sub-template granular bundling.

frontend-frameworks.name: Mithril.js
frontend-frameworks.description: Lightweight SPA framework with a fast virtual DOM plus built-in routing and XHR utilities.

frontend-frameworks.name: Ember.js
frontend-frameworks.description: Opinionated batteries-included framework with conventions, a strong CLI, and the Glimmer rendering engine.

frontend-frameworks.name: Stencil
frontend-frameworks.description: Compiler from Ionic for building standards-based Web Components with lazy loading and prerendering.

frontend-frameworks.name: Stimulus
frontend-frameworks.description: Hotwire's modest JavaScript framework that wires behavior to existing server-rendered HTML via controllers.

frontend-frameworks.name: Aurelia
frontend-frameworks.description: Modular, convention-driven framework with two-way binding, dependency injection, and extensible architecture.

frontend-frameworks.name: Riot.js
frontend-frameworks.description: Tiny component framework with a simple custom-tag syntax and minimal API surface.

frontend-frameworks.name: Inferno
frontend-frameworks.description: Fast React-like library focused on extreme rendering performance for high-throughput UIs.

meta-frameworks.name: Remix
meta-frameworks.description: Full-stack web framework focused on web standards, nested routes, and progressive enhancement.

meta-frameworks.name: Vike
meta-frameworks.description: Modular Vite-based meta-framework letting you bring your own UI library, with flexible rendering and type-safe RPC.

meta-frameworks.name: Analog
meta-frameworks.description: Vite-powered meta-framework for Angular with file-based routing, server routes, and SSR.

meta-frameworks.name: Waku
meta-frameworks.description: Minimal React meta-framework built around React Server Components with file-based routing.

meta-frameworks.name: RedwoodSDK
meta-frameworks.description: Server-first React meta-framework built specifically for the Cloudflare Workers platform.

meta-frameworks.name: Fresh
meta-frameworks.description: Deno-native full-stack framework using Preact and an islands architecture with zero client JS by default.

meta-frameworks.name: Eleventy
meta-frameworks.description: Flexible zero-JS static site generator that works with many template languages.

meta-frameworks.name: Gatsby
meta-frameworks.description: React-based static site generator with a GraphQL data layer and a large plugin ecosystem.

meta-frameworks.name: Hydrogen
meta-frameworks.description: Shopify's React framework for building custom, headless commerce storefronts on Oxygen.

meta-frameworks.name: Docusaurus
meta-frameworks.description: Meta's React-based static generator optimized for documentation sites with versioning and search.

css-tools.name: Sass
css-tools.description: The most widely used CSS preprocessor, adding variables, nesting, mixins, and partials.

css-tools.name: PostCSS
css-tools.description: Tool for transforming CSS with JavaScript plugins like autoprefixer and preset-env.

css-tools.name: Less
css-tools.description: Mature CSS preprocessor with variables, mixins, and nesting, popular in legacy and Bootstrap stacks.

css-tools.name: Lightning CSS
css-tools.description: Rust-based CSS parser, transformer, and minifier used by Tailwind and many bundlers.

css-tools.name: StyleX
css-tools.description: Meta's compile-time atomic CSS-in-JS library used across Facebook and Instagram.

css-tools.name: Linaria
css-tools.description: Zero-runtime CSS-in-JS that extracts styles to real CSS files at build time.

css-tools.name: Bootstrap
css-tools.description: Ubiquitous component-and-grid CSS framework for quick, consistent, responsive UIs.

css-tools.name: Bulma
css-tools.description: Flexbox-based, JavaScript-free CSS framework with a clean modular component set.

css-tools.name: Pico CSS
css-tools.description: Minimal classless CSS framework that styles semantic HTML with sensible defaults.

ui-component-libraries.name: PrimeReact
ui-component-libraries.description: Comprehensive React UI suite with 80+ components, styled and unstyled themes, and prebuilt blocks.

ui-component-libraries.name: daisyUI
ui-component-libraries.description: Tailwind-based component classes giving themeable buttons, cards, and inputs without leaving HTML.

ui-component-libraries.name: React Aria
ui-component-libraries.description: Adobe's library of accessible, unstyled React hooks and components for building design systems.

ui-component-libraries.name: Vuetify
ui-component-libraries.description: The leading Material Design component framework for Vue with 80+ documented components.

ui-component-libraries.name: PrimeVue
ui-component-libraries.description: Enterprise-ready Vue component library with a large component set and Tailwind theming.

ui-component-libraries.name: Quasar
ui-component-libraries.description: Vue framework with a rich component set targeting web, mobile, and desktop from one codebase.

ui-component-libraries.name: Element Plus
ui-component-libraries.description: Vue 3 successor to Element UI with clean components, TypeScript support, and i18n.

ui-component-libraries.name: Naive UI
ui-component-libraries.description: Lightweight Vue 3 component library with theming, dark mode, and full TypeScript types.

ui-component-libraries.name: Flowbite
ui-component-libraries.description: Open-source UI component library built on Tailwind CSS with framework bindings.

ui-component-libraries.name: Tremor
ui-component-libraries.description: React components and charts for building dashboards quickly with Tailwind styling.

ui-component-libraries.name: Magic UI
ui-component-libraries.description: Copy-in animated React components and effects designed to pair with shadcn/ui.

state-management.name: Redux
state-management.description: The original predictable state container for JS apps, now primarily used via Redux Toolkit.

state-management.name: XState
state-management.description: State machines and statecharts that make invalid states impossible, with visual tooling from Stately.

state-management.name: Effector
state-management.description: Reactive state manager built around stores, events, and effects with strong type inference.

state-management.name: Legend-State
state-management.description: Ultra-fast signal-based state library with fine-grained reactivity and built-in persistence.

state-management.name: Pinia
state-management.description: The official Vue store with an intuitive composition-style API and great devtools.

state-management.name: Apollo Client
state-management.description: Comprehensive GraphQL client managing remote data, normalized caching, and local state.

state-management.name: TanStack Store
state-management.description: Framework-agnostic reactive store underpinning the TanStack libraries.

state-management.name: RTK Query
state-management.description: Data fetching and caching layer built into Redux Toolkit for server state.
